summary: W885 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing the W884 bundled source-triangulation provider with explicit source pretriangulated, source triangulated, and triangle-completion fields. The assembled W722 provider feeds W884, then W883, W882, W881, W880, and W879. Product success remains false because the explicit W885 fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W885 exposes the W722 source-triangulation provider as three explicit fields, but those fields and the other W885 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

The remaining W885 fields are boundary data, relation data, target surjectivity and compactness, matched selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closedness branch data, normalized fixed-target data, a Pretriangulated structure on BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA, an IsTriangulated structure on that source, source-side triangle-completion data, endpoint strict-topology data, and localized-right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the ten W885 explicit source-triangulation field inputs.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
